stemHtml: The axis of the earth is inclined towards the plane of the ecliptic. As a result, what is correct concerning the temperature in Egypt (25°N), compared South Africa (25°S)?

options.a: In July, the weather will be warmer in Egypt, and in January, the weather will be warmer in South Africa.
options.b: In July, the weather will be warmer in South Africa, and in January, the weather will be colder in Egypt.
options.c: In July, the weather will be warmer in Egypt, and in January, the weather will be colder in South Africa.
options.d: The temperature will be approximately the same throughout the year.
